name: Zucchini Carrot Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 12-muffin pan by spraying with cooking spray and lightly flaking with flour.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine oats, flour, sugar, baking powder, and nutmeg.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine grated carrots, zucchini, milk, applesauce, and egg whites. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened.
5. Using an ice cream scoop, fill the muffin pan almost full.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
